# toll-booth-announce — Full Reference

> Bridge between toll-booth (L402 middleware) and 402-announce (Nostr service discovery)

## API

### announce(boothConfig, options)

Maps a toll-booth config to a kind 31402 Nostr event and publishes it.

Parameters:
- boothConfig: BoothConfigLike — your toll-booth pricing config
- options: TollBoothAnnounceOptions — Nostr publishing options

Returns: Promise<Announcement> — handle with eventId, pubkey, close()

### BoothConfigLike

interface BoothConfigLike {
  pricing: Record<string, number | PriceInfo | Record<string, number | PriceInfo>>
  serviceName?: string
  hasBackend?: boolean
  xcashu?: { mints: string[] }
  ietfPayment?: { realm: string }
}

### TollBoothAnnounceOptions

interface TollBoothAnnounceOptions {
  secretKey: string       // 64-char hex Nostr secret key
  relays: string[]        // wss:// relay URLs
  urls: string[]          // Public URLs (1–10, tried in order)
  about: string           // Service description
  paymentMethods?: string[][] // Override auto-derived methods
  identifier?: string     // Override auto-derived d-tag
  picture?: string        // Icon URL
  topics?: string[]       // Filtering tags
  version?: string        // Service version
}

## Pricing Mapping

toll-booth-announce extracts pricing from three formats:

1. Flat number: { '/api': 10 } → { capability: '/api', price: 10, currency: 'sats' }
2. PriceInfo: { '/api': { sats: 10, usd: 1 } } → emits both sats and usd price tags
3. Tiered: { '/api': { default: 10, premium: 50 } } → uses default tier

## Payment Method Auto-Derivation

When paymentMethods is not provided:
- hasBackend: true → includes ['l402', 'lightning']
- ietfPayment configured → includes ['payment', 'lightning']
- xcashu configured → includes ['xcashu']
- User-provided paymentMethods override all auto-derivation

## Example

import { announce } from 'toll-booth-announce'

const handle = await announce(
  {
    pricing: { '/api/joke': 1, '/api/roast': 5 },
    serviceName: 'Jokes API',
    hasBackend: true,
    xcashu: { mints: ['https://mint.minibits.cash'] },
  },
  {
    secretKey: process.env.NOSTR_SECRET_KEY!,
    relays: ['wss://relay.damus.io', 'wss://relay.primal.net'],
    urls: ['https://jokes.trotters.dev'],
    about: 'A joke-telling API behind an L402 paywall',
    topics: ['comedy', 'ai'],
  },
)

// Auto-derived: paymentMethods = [['l402', 'lightning'], ['xcashu']]
console.log('Announced:', handle.eventId)
handle.close()

## Dependencies

- 402-announce (runtime) — Nostr event building and publishing
- @forgesworn/toll-booth (peer) — toll-booth types

## Related

- toll-booth: L402/xcashu payment middleware (npm: @forgesworn/toll-booth)
- 402-announce: Low-level Nostr announcement library (npm: 402-announce)
- 402-mcp: MCP server for AI agent discovery and payment
